title: ixeridium gracile var. khasianum
intro: Ixeridium gracile var. khasianum, also known as Himalayan ixeridium, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, including relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as aiding in digestion and respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which is used to treat various ailments, and its leaves and roots are also used in folk medicine.
